allow: PowerShell($imagePath = "c:\\Users\\Carlos\\Downloads\\Sedia\\pnpm\\sedia\\public\\image"; if \(Test-Path $imagePath\) { Get-ChildItem -Path $imagePath -Recurse -File | Select-Object @{Name="RelPath";Expression={$_.FullName -replace [regex]::Escape\($imagePath\),''}}, @{Name="SizeKB";Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,2\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { "image folder not found" })

PowerShell($videoPath = "c:\\Users\\Carlos\\Downloads\\Sedia\\pnpm\\sedia\\public\\video"; if \(Test-Path $videoPath\) { Get-ChildItem -Path $videoPath -Recurse -File | Select-Object Name, @{Name="SizeMB";Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}} } else { "video folder not found" })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "c:\\Users\\Carlos\\Downloads\\Sedia\\pnpm\\sedia\\resources\\fonts"\) { Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Carlos\\Downloads\\Sedia\\pnpm\\sedia\\resources\\fonts" -Recurse -File | Select-Object Name, @{Name="SizeKB";Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,2\)}} } else { "fonts folder not found" })
